briefs.title: BC Gaming Services Regulation Rewritten — New Rules Take Effect April 2026
briefs.summary: BC's Gaming Control Act General Manager issued a new regulation clarifying which services count as 'gaming services' and which are excluded, taking effect April 13, 2026. Businesses that supply, distribute, or support lottery or casino gaming in BC need to review whether their activities fall under the new rules.
briefs.action_required: Review your gaming-related services against the new regulation before April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Gaming Services and Gaming Work Regulation takes effect
